description: MatiBlizzard farm ([M00], weak account) Bradley skill-ladder experiment, 2026-07-03 09:41-09:49 (WOS_BattleReports_CalibrationBradley.pdf, 7 pages). Fixed army 30 troops (10 Inf T10 + 10 Lancer T9 + 10 Marks T9, pre-FC green badges) vs Lv13 Giant Tapir (+18.5%), one battle per config, hero profile screenshot per page. Bradley Lv56 SSR in MARKSMAN slot. Config changes are IRREVERSIBLE (stars/skill levels only go up). own = [losses, injured, lightly, survivors]; every 30-troop run is an own-side wipe [0,3,27,0].

panel_marksman_by_config.note: 1-star deltas 144.7/144.7/4.9/4.9 == card values EXACTLY (card screenshot on p2). 2-star card grew to 206.7/206.7/4.9/4.9. Skill upgrades (p3->p6) changed the panel NOT AT ALL - skills are panel-invisible, stars/level grow the card.

Power Shot (S2).effect: Damage Dealt to Lancers +X%, to Infantry +Y% for all troops

Tactical Assistance (S3).effect: Damage Dealt +X% for all troops for 2 turns every 4 turns

battles.config: S3L3 + ARMY CHANGED to 120 (100 Inf T10 + 10 L + 10 M)

beast_structure_refined: Lv13 Giant Tapir = SIX groups: Inf 150+590 (Lv4.2), Lancer 170+690 (Lv4.1), Marks 170+690 (Lv4.1) - subgroup split of the known 740/860/860.
key_findings: CARD INJECTION PROVEN BY DOCUMENT: hero-card Expedition stats (+144.69/+144.69/+4.83/+4.83) == panel deltas to the display digit.
Stars grow the CARD (2star: +206.7); skill levels grow only battle-time effects; panel cleanly separates the two.
No-hero -> 1star: marksman kills 81 -> 170 (x2.10) - the single strongest clean signal for the attack->damage exponent fit (panel-documented x1.54 eff attack + S2 DD+10% vs infantry front).
Per-skill-level deltas (3-6% EV) are BELOW single-run RNG noise (lancer kill column swings 59-95 across configs with no lancer-relevant change). Skill-ladder resolution needs ~5 repeats per config.
Absorption reconfirmed: beast lancer groups take ZERO losses in every 30-troop run; beast marks losses = Ambusher bypass only.
p7: adding a 100-inf wall turns DEFEAT (324 kills) into VICTORY (2,460 wipe) with 10x fewer proportional casualties - wall economics again.
